output.context: CSS-only change: new @utility bg-dark-pattern (bg-charcoal + background-image texture) swapped for before:bg-charcoal in TSX and PHP dark mode classes.

rawContent.note: Test page is trashed (status: trash, slug: test-content-with-media__trashed-2). taktician_compare_raw_content could not find slug. Full QA run performed using rendered content from WP REST API (page ID 184).

build.details: bun run build and bun run lint both pass with 0 errors. One pre-existing lint warning in ContentWithMedia.tsx (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps on useEffect missing mediaRenderId dependency) — this is a pre-existing issue across multiple blocks, not introduced by this change.

registration.details: block.json schema valid, name format correct (takt/content-with-media), all file references exist, attribute types valid.

tsxPhpSync.details: The before:bg-charcoal → before:bg-dark-pattern swap is correctly applied identically in both files.

evidence.class: relative text-white before:absolute before:bg-dark-pattern before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8
relative text-white before:absolute before:bg-dark-pattern before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8

automaticValidation.htmlStructureSync: warning — root wrapper mismatch (TSX has BlockControls as first child; PHP has section). This is a pre-existing false positive from the sync tool caused by editor-only controls in TSX. Not a functional issue.

bgDarkPatternUtility.details: The @utility bg-dark-pattern is correctly defined in resources/css/screen/colors.css at lines 130-136.

definition.content: @utility bg-dark-pattern { background-color: var(--color-charcoal); background-image: url('../images/dark-bg.png'); background-size: 500px auto; background-position: center; background-repeat: repeat; }

bgDarkPatternUtility.assetFile: resources/images/dark-bg.png — confirmed present in git status as newly tracked.

darkModeRendering.details: Rendered HTML from WP REST API (page ID 184) confirms the dark mode variation (variation 3: 'Single Image - Dark Mode') correctly outputs before:bg-dark-pattern on both the text column div and the media column div.
darkModeRendering.evidence: Dark mode section class: 'content-with-media py-10 sm:py-16 dark bg-transparent! not-discourse wp-block-takt-content-with-media'. Text column class includes: 'relative text-white before:absolute before:bg-dark-pattern before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8'. Media column class includes the same.

testPageStatus.details: Test page ID 184 has status: trash (slug: test-content-with-media__trashed-2). The page was trashed. Rendered HTML was still accessible via WP REST API and confirms correct output, but the live test URL (https://ign.localhost/test-content-with-media/) is no longer functional as a public page. Developer Agent should restore the test page.

issues.description: Test page (ID 184) is in trash. Slug is now 'test-content-with-media__trashed-2'. The test URL https://ign.localhost/test-content-with-media/ is non-functional.
issues.fix: Restore the test page from trash via WordPress admin or WP REST API: PATCH /wp/v2/pages/184 with { status: 'publish' }.
issues.impact: Prevents future QA from loading the test page in a browser or via taktician_page_audit.

issues.description: Pre-existing lint warning in ContentWithMedia.tsx line 106: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps — useEffect missing dependency 'mediaRenderId'. Not introduced by this change.
issues.fix: Use functional update: setMediaRenderId(m => ...) to remove dependency on mediaRenderId in the useEffect dependency array.
issues.note: Same pattern exists in Accordion.tsx and FullWidthMedia.tsx. Pre-existing issue.

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors (0 TypeScript errors, 0 build errors)
Lint passes (0 errors, pre-existing warnings only)
bg-dark-pattern @utility defined correctly in colors.css with charcoal background color + dark-bg.png texture
TSX uses before:bg-dark-pattern on both text and media columns when darkMode=true
PHP uses before:bg-dark-pattern on both text and media columns when $darkMode=true
TSX and PHP dark mode class strings match exactly (identical token-for-token)
Rendered HTML confirms before:bg-dark-pattern appears in live output for dark mode variation
No no-charcoal leftover class found in either TSX or PHP (swap is complete)
